metrics.textPreview: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship 184 KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center MR Marisol Reyes Finance · Steward Workspace › entrada-prod ⌘K Prototype mock · UC not verified Atlas AI GLOSSARY & CDE REGISTRY Shared business meaning, anchored to data Glossary terms link to source-of-record assets. Critical Data Elements have stricter ownership, certification, and lineage requirements. + New term Glossary 4 CDE Registry 5 Showing 4 of 4 governed glossary terms HIERARCHY 4 visible terms Root term Net Revenue No child terms recorded Root term Active Customer No child terms recorded Root term Churn Propensity No child terms recorded Root term Booking No child terms recorded Net Revenue Finance · Finance Stewards Approved Gross revenue minus discounts and refunds; recognized per ASC 606. Source-of-record column: `finance_prod.curated.revenue_daily.net_revenue_usd`. SOURCE Prototype fixture provenance ASSOCIATIONS 4 actor-visible linked assets REVIEW Status fixture; review n/a 4 assets View lineage -> Active Customer Customer · Customer Stewards Approved A customer with at least one billable order in the trailing 90 days. Computed in `customer_360.gold.customer_profile.lifecycle_stage`. SOURCE Prototype fixture provenance ASSOCIATIONS 7 actor-visible linked assets REVIEW Status fixture; review n/a 7 assets View lineage -> Churn Propensity Customer · Customer Stewards Approved Modeled probability that a customer will churn in the next 30 days.
